# Couponawy — Design Context & Bold Bazaar Theme Guide

*Generated by /teach-impeccable · Last updated 2026-04-23*
*Project: Couponawy (كوبوناوي) — Arabic coupon aggregator for Saudi Arabia & Gulf*

---

## Design Context

### Users

Arabic-speaking online shoppers across the Gulf and MENA region. Deal-seekers motivated by savings, driven by discovery. They arrive with intent: "I want to buy something and I want the best price." Their context is mobile-first, Arabic-native, and time-sensitive. The job to be done: **find a valid coupon fast, feel the win, move on to checkout**.

### Brand Personality

**Bold. Generous. Alive.**

Couponawy feels like the friend who always knows the deal — enthusiastic, dependable, never boring. The emotional goal is a small burst of delight on every visit: the feeling of getting away with something good.

Anti-personality: clinical, corporate, sleepy, overly minimal, purple-tech-startup.

### Design Principles

1. **The deal is always the hero.** Discount percentages, coupon codes, and savings amounts get the biggest visual weight. Everything else supports them.
2. **Urgency without pressure.** Bold doesn't mean loud. Strong color and clear hierarchy create momentum — not anxiety. No fake countdowns. No red everywhere.
3. **Arabic-first, not Arabic-translated.** RTL is a first-class citizen. Typography breathes. Rhythm is calibrated for Arabic text density.
4. **Scan in 3 seconds.** A user should identify the best coupon on any page in under 3 seconds. Bold headlines, clear category signals, tight grid.
5. **Trust through clarity.** Clean surfaces, visible store branding, no dark patterns. If a coupon is expired, say so clearly.

---

## Bold Bazaar Theme — Complete Specification

### What Bold Bazaar Means

Bold Bazaar is the name of Couponawy's design language. It is inspired by the energy of a physical bazaar — vivid, alive, a little loud, but organized and trustworthy. The two visual anchors are:

- **Red** — urgency, deals, energy. The dominant color. Owns the header, hero, and primary actions.
- **Yellow** — value, treasure, celebration. The accent. Used exclusively for numbers, highlights, and the primary CTA button on dark backgrounds. Never as a text color on light backgrounds.

Everything else — surfaces, body text, cards — is near-white cream. The contrast between saturated red/yellow and clean white is what gives the theme its punch.

---

## Color System

### Token Definitions (globals.css `@theme {}`)

```css
/* Primary — pure saturated red */
--color-brand-red:       oklch(49% 0.25 26);   /* Main red — header, buttons, badges */
--color-brand-red-dark:  oklch(41% 0.25 26);   /* Hero gradient end, hover states */
--color-brand-red-light: oklch(96% 0.05 26);   /* Red tinted backgrounds (subtle) */

/* Accent — electric yellow */
--color-brand-gold:        oklch(86% 0.19 94); /* Stat numbers, CTA on dark bg, highlights */
--color-brand-gold-light:  oklch(94% 0.10 94); /* Very subtle yellow tints */
--color-brand-gold-dark:   oklch(72% 0.17 88); /* Exclusive badges, darker gold hover */

/* Neutrals — near-white cream surfaces */
--color-cream:             oklch(99% 0.004 90); /* Page background, card background */
--color-cream-dark:        oklch(96% 0.005 90); /* Category strip, section dividers */
--color-charcoal:          oklch(14% 0.010 80); /* Primary text, CTA label on yellow */
--color-warm-brown:        oklch(45% 0.012 75); /* Secondary text, store categories */
--color-warm-brown-light:  oklch(62% 0.010 75); /* Placeholder text, captions */

/* Semantic */
--color-danger:  oklch(49% 0.25 26);   /* Same as brand-red — intentional */
--color-success: oklch(50% 0.19 145);  /* Green for confirmed/valid states */
--color-warning: oklch(86% 0.19 94);   /* Amber = same as brand-gold */
```

### Contrast Rules — Non-Negotiable

| Background | Allowed text colors | Forbidden |
|---|---|---|
| `brand-red` | `text-white`, `text-cream` | `text-brand-gold` (fails on light yellow), `text-cream/60` |
| `brand-red-dark` (hero) | `text-white`, `text-cream`, `text-brand-gold` | gray text |
| `brand-gold` (yellow bg) | `text-charcoal` ONLY | `text-cream`, `text-white` (both fail ~1.3:1) |
| `cream` / `cream-dark` | `text-charcoal`, `text-warm-brown`, `text-brand-red` | `text-brand-gold` (fails on light) |
| Black ticker | `text-brand-gold`, `text-white` | any gray |

**The golden rule:** Yellow text only on dark (red, black). Charcoal text on yellow backgrounds. Never yellow on cream.

---

## Typography

### Font

Single font family: **Cairo** (Google Fonts). All three roles (display, body, accent) use Cairo.

```tsx
// layout.tsx
const cairo = Cairo({
  subsets: ["arabic", "latin"],
  weight: ["400", "600", "700", "800", "900"],
  variable: "--font-cairo",
  display: "swap",
});
```

### Scale

| Role | Size | Weight | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Hero headline | 56–64px (md: fluid) | 900 | Hero section primary text |
| Section header | 28–32px | 800 | Section titles like "أفضل الكوبونات" |
| Card title | 16–18px | 700 | Coupon name, store name |
| Nav / labels | 14–15px | 600 | Header nav, pill labels, form labels |
| Body / descriptions | 14–16px | 400 | Coupon descriptions, body copy |
| Caption / metadata | 11–13px | 400 | Store category below name, timestamps |

### Type Rules

- **RTL always.** `html { direction: rtl }`. Never override per-component.
- **No letter-spacing on Arabic.** Default kerning. Never add positive letter-spacing to Arabic glyphs.
- **Line height for Arabic:** 1.6 for body text. 1.3–1.4 for headlines (Arabic ascenders are taller).
- **Number display:** Eastern Arabic numerals (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) for displayed stats and counts. Latin numerals for percentage badges on coupon cards (visual clarity at small size).

---

## Page Architecture — Section by Section

### 1. Header

**Appearance:**
- Full-width, flat `bg-brand-red`. No gradient. No shadow. No border-bottom.
- Height: 64px (desktop), 56px (mobile).
- Sticky at top with `z-50`.

**Layout (RTL):**
- **Right:** Logo `كوبوناوي` — `text-white`, font-weight 900, ~28px. The ۞ ornament in `text-brand-gold` (via `inverted` prop on `<Logo>`).
- **Center:** Navigation links — `text-white`, font-weight 600, 15px. Links: المتاجر | الفئات | عروض اليوم. Hidden on mobile.
- **Left:** Primary CTA button — **solid white fill** (`bg-white text-brand-red`), rounded-lg, font-weight 700. Label: "جميع الكوبونات". This is NOT a glass button. Solid white on red.

**Interactive controls on header (search, country switcher, mobile menu):**
- All use the **glass-on-red** pattern: `bg-white/15 border border-white/25 text-white`
- Hover: `hover:bg-white/22 hover:border-white/40`
- This creates visual integration — they float within the red, not against it.

**What to avoid:**
- No cream/gold elements in the header. Everything is white, white/opacity, or the solid white CTA.
- No border-bottom on the header.
- No shadow on the header.

---

### 2. Ticker Bar (Announcement Strip)

**Appearance:**
- Full-width. Background: near-black (`oklch(8% 0.005 80)` — not pure black, slightly warm).
- Height: 40px.
- Positioned directly below the header.

**Content:**
- Three rotating messages in yellow (`text-brand-gold`), separated by `·` dividers in `text-white/30`:
  1. 🔥 عروض نهاية الأسبوع — خصم يصل لـ ٧٠٪
  2. ⚡ كوبونات جديدة كل ساعة
  3. ✅ +٢,٤٠٠ كوبون فعال الآن
- Font-weight: 600. Font-size: 13px.

**Motion:**
- Continuous RTL marquee scroll. Duration: ~30 seconds for one full loop. Linear easing (no ease-in/out — constant speed like a news ticker).
- Duplicate content in DOM so the loop is seamless.
- Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` — pauses the scroll but keeps content visible.

**Purpose:**
- Creates urgency and social proof above the fold without using any hero real estate.
- The black strip creates visual contrast between the red header and the crimson hero — an intentional three-tier: red → black → dark red.

---

### 3. Hero Section

This is the most important section. The current cream implementation is wrong. The hero must be **dark and dramatic**.

**Background:**
```css
background: radial-gradient(
  ellipse at 65% 50%,
  oklch(41% 0.25 26) 0%,      /* brand-red-dark — crimson center */
  oklch(10% 0.008 26) 75%     /* near-black with faint red hue at edge */
);
```
The gradient radiates outward from right-of-center (where the headline is) toward black at the edges. The left side (where stat cards sit) is darker.

**Layout:**
- Two-column layout on desktop: content right (60%), stat cards left (40%).
- Single column on mobile: headline first, then stat cards below.
- Vertical padding: `py-20 md:py-28`.
- Min-height: 420px desktop.

**Right Column — Text Content:**

1. **Headline (two lines):**
   - Line 1: `خصومات تصل` — `text-white`, font-weight 900, 52–64px
   - Line 2: `إلى ` (white) + `٧٠٪` (yellow, `text-brand-gold`) — same weight and size
   - The percentage is inline within the headline, not a separate element beneath.

2. **Subtext:**
   - `اكتشف أفضل كوبونات الخصم من المتاجر الكبرى`
   - Color: `text-white/70` — muted white, not gray
   - Size: 16–17px, font-weight 400
   - Line-height: 1.7
   - Max-width: ~380px

3. **CTA Button:**
   - Background: `bg-brand-gold`
   - Text: `text-charcoal` (NOT white — yellow bg requires dark text for contrast)
   - Font-weight: 800
   - Size: large — `px-8 py-4`, `text-base`
   - Border-radius: `rounded-xl`
   - Label: `ابدأ التوفير الآن`
   - Hover: `hover:bg-brand-gold-dark` — slightly deeper yellow
   - Transition: 150ms ease-out
   - Shadow on hover: `hover:shadow-gold` — warm yellow glow

**Left Column — Stat Cards:**

A 2×2 grid of four metric cards.

Card structure (each):
```
Background: bg-black/30 with border border-white/10
Border-radius: rounded-2xl
Padding: p-5 md:p-6
Number: text-brand-gold, font-weight 900, 28–32px
Label: text-white/60, font-weight 400, 12px
```

Four cards (top-right → top-left → bottom-right → bottom-left in RTL):
| Number | Label |
|---|---|
| ٥٠٠+ | متجر شريك |
| ٢,٤٠٠+ | كوبون فعال |
| يومي | تحديث |
| ٩٨٪ | معدل النجاح |

**Animation:**
- Hero content: `animate-fade-up` with stagger (headline 0ms, subtext 75ms, CTA 150ms)
- Stat cards: stagger 50ms each, starting at 200ms after page load

**What to avoid:**
- No cream or white background in the hero. The entire section is dark.
- No decorative shapes or patterns over the gradient — the gradient itself is the backdrop.
- No second CTA button (e.g., "جميع المتاجر" as outline). One CTA only in the hero.

---

### 4. Category Filter Strip

**Appearance:**
- Background: `bg-cream-dark` — slightly off-white, distinct from the pure cream sections below.
- Height: 52px (vertically centered pills).
- Full-width. Flush below the hero (no margin between).
- Bottom border: `border-b border-brand-gold/15` — a very subtle warm divider.
- Horizontally scrollable on mobile (no wrapping). Hide scrollbar.

**Pills:**
- Active: `bg-brand-red text-white` — solid red fill, no border
- Inactive: `bg-cream border border-brand-gold/20 text-charcoal` — cream background with warm gold border
- Hover (inactive): `hover:border-brand-red/40 hover:text-brand-red`
- Font-weight: 600. Font-size: 14px.
- Shape: `rounded-full`
- Padding: `px-4 py-2`
- Gap between pills: `gap-2`

**Labels (left to right in RTL = right-aligned order):**
الكل | إلكترونيات | أزياء | مطاعم | سفر | جمال | رياضة

**Sticky behavior:**
- The filter strip becomes sticky below the header after the hero scrolls out of view. `sticky top-[64px] z-40`.

---

### 5. Content Sections (Coupons, Stores, Categories)

**Surface:**
- Background: `bg-cream` — pure near-white. No tints.
- Section vertical padding: `py-14` to `py-16`.

**Section Header Row:**
- Layout: `flex items-center justify-between`
- Right side: emoji + bold label (e.g., `🔥 أشعل التوفير`)
  - `text-charcoal`, font-weight 800, 22–26px
- Left side: small action button
  - `bg-brand-red text-white`, `rounded-lg`, `px-4 py-2`, font-weight 600, 14px
  - Label: "عرض الكل"

**Coupon Cards:**
- Background: `bg-cream` with `border border-brand-gold/20`
- Border-radius: `rounded-2xl`
- Shadow: subtle — `shadow-sm` at rest, `shadow-md` on hover
- Hover: `hover:border-brand-red/30`
- Transition: 200ms ease-out on shadow and border

Card internal structure:
1. **Discount badge** (top corner, RTL = top-right):
   - `bg-brand-red text-white` (RED, not yellow — red badges on white cards)
   - `rounded-xl px-3 py-1.5`
   - Font-weight: 900. Example: `٣٠٪`

2. **Store avatar**:
   - Colored circle or square (store-specific color, not brand-red)
   - First letter(s) of store name if no logo
   - Size: 48×48px card thumbnail

3. **Store name**: `text-charcoal`, font-weight 700, 16px

4. **Store category**: `text-warm-brown`, font-weight 400, 13px

5. **Coupon code area** (if visible): monospace-style pill, `bg-cream-dark border border-brand-gold/30`

**Store Logo Strip (Featured Stores):**
- Layout: `flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4`
- Each store: circular avatar (64×64px) + store name below
- Avatar ring: `ring-2 ring-brand-gold/20`
- Hover: `ring-brand-red/40` + subtle lift
- Name: `text-warm-brown`, 11px, truncated

**Category Pills (bottom section):**
- Layout: `flex flex-wrap gap-3`
- Pill: `bg-cream border border-brand-gold/25`
- Icon: `text-brand-red`, animated on group-hover
- Text: `text-charcoal`, font-weight 700
- Count badge inside pill: `bg-brand-gold/15 text-brand-gold-dark`
- Hover: `hover:bg-brand-red hover:border-brand-red hover:text-cream` — full inversion

---

### 6. Footer

**Appearance:**
- Background: `bg-brand-red-dark` — the darker crimson, not pure brand-red.
- Top border: none (the red gradient provides natural separation).
- Padding: `py-12`.

**Logo in footer:**
- Must use `inverted` prop → `text-white` for brand name, `text-brand-gold` for ۞ ornament.
- Never render the default `text-brand-red` logo on a red background.

**Text colors in footer:**
- Section headings: `text-brand-gold-light` — muted yellow, not full yellow
- Link text at rest: `text-cream/70`
- Link text hover: `text-cream`
- Copyright / tagline: `text-cream/60`
- Section divider: `border-cream/10`

**Copy:**
- Tagline: `صُنع بشغف في المملكة العربية السعودية`
- Copyright: `© [year] كوبوناوي. جميع الحقوق محفوظة.`

---

## Interactive States — Complete Map

Every interactive element must implement all of these:

| State | Pattern |
|---|---|
| Default | As described per component |
| Hover | Color shift + subtle lift (`translateY(-2px)`) or border change |
| Focus | Visible ring: `ring-2 ring-brand-red ring-offset-2` |
| Active / Press | Quick scale down: `active:scale-[0.97]` |
| Disabled | `opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed` — no hover effects |
| Loading | Reduced opacity + spinner or pulse |

**Focus rings on dark backgrounds (header, hero, ticker):**
- Use `ring-white ring-offset-brand-red` so the ring is visible against red.

---

## Motion System

### Easing
All animations use `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` — ease-out-expo. Confident, decisive deceleration.

**Never use:** bounce (`cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)`), elastic, or ease-in-out for UI transitions.

### Duration Scale

| Speed | Duration | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Instant | 100–150ms | Button press feedback, toggle |
| Fast | 200–250ms | Hover states, color transitions |
| Normal | 300–400ms | State changes, drawer open |
| Slow | 450–550ms | Page entrance animations |

### Keyframe Inventory

```css
/* fade-up: page load entrance */
fade-up: opacity 0→1, translateY 14px→0, 500ms ease-out-expo

/* fade-in: overlay, backdrop */
fade-in: opacity 0→1, 350ms ease-out-expo

/* scale-in: modal, popover */
scale-in: opacity 0→1, scale 0.93→1, 400ms ease-out-expo

/* reveal-pop: coupon code reveal */
reveal-pop: scale 0.88→1.02→1 + translateY 6→-2→0, 450ms — "you got the deal" feel

/* gold-flash: copy success inner glow */
gold-flash: inset box-shadow pulse with brand-gold, 650ms

/* icon-bounce: category icon hover */
icon-bounce: scale 1→1.28→1.10→1, rotate 0→-10→5→0deg, 450ms
```

### Stagger System

```css
.stagger-children > *:nth-child(n) {
  animation-delay: (n-1) * 50ms;
}
/* Covers 8 children (0ms to 350ms) */
```

### Ticker Marquee

```css
/* Continuous RTL scroll */
@keyframes ticker-scroll {
  from { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  to   { transform: translateX(0); }
}
/* Duration: 30s. Timing: linear. Iteration: infinite. */
/* Duplicate content in DOM for seamless loop. */
/* prefers-reduced-motion: animation-play-state: paused */
```

### Reduced Motion

```css
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
  }
}
```

---

## Glass-on-Red Pattern

Interactive UI controls embedded within the red header use a unified glass treatment:

```
bg-white/15
border border-white/25
text-white
rounded-full
transition-colors duration-200

hover:bg-white/22
hover:border-white/40
```

**Which components use this:**
- Search input (desktop)
- Country switcher button
- Mobile hamburger menu button

**Which components do NOT use this:**
- Primary CTA button in header — uses solid `bg-white text-brand-red` (not glass)
- Logo — not interactive in this sense

---

## Spacing Rhythm

Base unit: 4px.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Header height | 64px | `h-16` |
| Ticker height | 40px | `h-10` |
| Section padding | 56–64px | `py-14` to `py-16` |
| Hero padding | 80–112px | `py-20 md:py-28` |
| Card gap | 20px | `gap-5` |
| Card inner padding | 24px | `p-6` |
| Pill padding | 8px × 16px | `py-2 px-4` |
| Container max-width | 1280px | `size="xl"` |

---

## Component Quick Reference

| Component | Key classes |
|---|---|
| Header | `bg-brand-red h-16 sticky top-0 z-50` |
| Header CTA | `bg-white text-brand-red font-bold rounded-lg px-4 py-2` |
| Glass control | `bg-white/15 border border-white/25 text-white rounded-full` |
| Ticker | `bg-[oklch(8%_0.005_80)] text-brand-gold h-10 overflow-hidden` |
| Hero section | `bg-[radial-gradient(...)] py-20 md:py-28 text-white` |
| Hero headline span (yellow) | `text-brand-gold` inline within white headline |
| Hero CTA | `bg-brand-gold text-charcoal font-extrabold rounded-xl px-8 py-4` |
| Stat card | `bg-black/30 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6` |
| Stat number | `text-brand-gold font-black text-3xl` |
| Stat label | `text-white/60 text-xs` |
| Category strip | `bg-cream-dark border-b border-brand-gold/15 h-13` |
| Active pill | `bg-brand-red text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-semibold` |
| Inactive pill | `bg-cream border border-brand-gold/20 text-charcoal rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-semibold` |
| Coupon card | `bg-cream border border-brand-gold/20 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-brand-red/30` |
| Discount badge on card | `bg-brand-red text-white rounded-xl px-3 py-1.5 font-black text-sm` |
| Discount badge (standalone yellow) | `bg-brand-gold text-charcoal rounded-xl px-3 py-1.5 font-black text-sm` |
| Footer | `bg-brand-red-dark text-cream` |
| Footer logo | `<Logo inverted />` — always |
| Footer link | `text-cream/70 hover:text-cream` |
| Footer heading | `text-brand-gold-light font-bold text-sm` |

---

## Anti-Patterns — Never Do These

- **Yellow on cream.** `text-brand-gold` on `bg-cream` or `bg-cream-dark` = 1.3:1 contrast. Invisible. Use `text-charcoal` or `text-brand-red` on light surfaces.
- **Cream logo in footer.** Logo default renders red text on red background. Always pass `inverted` prop in footer.
- **Glass button as primary CTA.** The header CTA "جميع الكوبونات" is solid white, not glass. Glass is for utility controls (search, country, menu).
- **Cream hero background.** The hero is dark. Crimson-to-black gradient. Never revert to cream hero.
- **Red text on red background.** Never `text-brand-red` on `bg-brand-red` or `bg-brand-red-dark`.
- **More than one CTA in the hero.** One yellow button only. No outline secondary button in the hero.
- **Yellow button on cream/white surfaces.** Yellow CTA only appears on dark (red, black) backgrounds where contrast is safe.
- **Hardcoded hex/rgb colors.** All colors use OKLCH tokens. Exception: `#25D366` for WhatsApp (official brand color).
- **Multiple font families.** Cairo only. No Tajawal, Noto, Amiri, or system fonts in the design.
- **Bounce or elastic easing.** Only ease-out-expo `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)`.

---

## RTL-Specific Rules

- `html { direction: rtl }` — global. Never override.
- Use logical CSS properties: `margin-inline-start`, `padding-inline-end`, `border-inline-start` — not left/right.
- Arrow icons on CTAs: use `ArrowLeft` (from lucide-react) which points right in RTL context.
- Text alignment: `text-right` is the RTL default. Use `text-center` only for hero/section headers intended to be centered.
- Flex row direction: in RTL, `flex-row` reads right-to-left automatically. No need to reverse.
- Drawer/sidebar: slides in from the right (`right-0`, `translate-x-full` → `translate-x-0`).
- Marquee ticker: animates in RTL direction (content moves right-to-left visually).

---

*This file is the single source of truth for Couponawy's design system. Update here whenever a design decision is made. Every design skill (/polish, /critique, /animate, etc.) reads this file before acting.*
